重大頭條（股市相關） ·

台股大型公司4月營收盤點：233家數據與年增強弱分布Large-Cap Taiwan Stocks Wrap Up April Revenue Picture

https://news.cnyes.com/news/id/6460937

  • 截至台北時間2026年5月16日上午，依前一日申報整理，實收資本額達50億元、已公布4月營收的大型公司共233家。
  • 整理方式另以公布當日的年增率與月增率各自列出前三名。
  • 在這批大型公司中，4月營收年成長逾25％者計81家。
  • 年增率跌逾20％者有17家，顯示個股表現落差明顯。

此次盤點彙整233家符合門檻的大型公司4月營收，並區分年增與月增領先族群；整體以強勁年增家數較多，仍有一成餘公司承受逾兩成年減壓力。

  • As of the morning of May 16, 2026 Taipei time, 233 large caps (paid-in capital ≥ NT$5b) had filed April revenue from the prior session.
  • The recap ranks the top three by YoY and by MoM revenue growth on the filing date.
  • Among these companies, 81 reported April revenue up more than 25% YoY.
  • Seventeen posted YoY declines steeper than 20%, underscoring a wide performance gap.

This snapshot covers 233 large-cap April revenue filings with separate YoY and MoM leader boards: many firms grew sharply YoY while a smaller set fel…
